name: "You've killed all my teammates,see if you can get past through me."
description: "If that's the way you want to end my life like this,then i don't mind. let me settle this,if i land all of my arrows at you,you are dead. if you land all your shots at me however,im done for. this is my life,or YOURS." Anyways i never saw anyone make a bot of her,so i did it myself.
creator: Waitwhyamihere
